prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical pastel anime motivational poster where a cute idol-like girl stands in front of a background completely filled with oversized Japanese inner-monologue typography, giving the feeling that her excited thoughts are visualized across the entire image.

Canvas: Tall vertical 2:3 portrait poster, soft white-to-lavender background, high resolution, dreamy glowing atmosphere. Use a light purple, lilac, lavender, and pale pink color palette with watercolor softness and sparkling highlights.

Main subject: Center a full-body anime girl with long wavy pale lavender hair, decorated with multiple purple flower hair clips and small star accessories. Her face is covered by a centered opaque pale-lavender square placeholder, as if preserving identity, while the hairstyle, pose, outfit, and overall character silhouette remain visible. She wears a frilly pastel idol street-fashion outfit: translucent off-shoulder jacket, cropped top, layered blue-lavender skirt, purple belt, choker, long necklace with a jellyfish-like charm, and a small transparent heart-shaped handbag filled with purple flowers. Her left hand reaches forward toward the viewer, palm open, creating a hopeful, inviting pose; her other hand holds a strap near her chest.

Typography layout: Fill the entire background around the character with dense Japanese text in varying font sizes, all in soft purple. Use a mixture of bold Mincho-style serif headlines and smaller handwritten/rounded Japanese phrases. The text should wrap around the character without covering the body too much, except the face placeholder. Make the typography feel emotional, optimistic, excited, and self-encouraging.

Visible text content: Include exactly 7 large headline phrases: 1) 「私、もっと輝けるはず。」 as the largest headline across the upper middle, 2) 「未来、楽しみ!」 on the upper right, 3) 「絶対、素敵になるよね!」 across the lower center, 4) 「楽しさがいちばんの原動力!」 on the lower right, 5) 「笑顔でいられる未来へ。」 below it, 6) 「私のステージ、始まってる。」 along the lower left, 7) 「心不な未来なんだ。」 near the upper left. Also include many smaller supporting phrases such as 「好きなこと、全部やりたい。」, 「ワクワクが止まらない!」, 「心が踊るって、こんな感じ。」, 「夢が広がってく。」, 「私の色で、世界をいっぱいにしたい。」, 「見ててね、絶対にすごい私を見せるから。」, 「この気持ち、忘れたくない。」, 「ずっと、憧れてた。」, 「今、叶えたい。」, 「わたしだけの物語をつくる!」, 「みんなを笑顔にしたい。」, 「誰かの心を照らせる存在になりたい。」, 「ワクワクを届けたい。」, 「もっと上へ!」, 「もっと高く!」, 「夢中になれることがあるって、幸せだよね。」, 「きらきらしていたい。」, 「最高の自分になりたい。」, 「きっとできる!」, 「諦めたくないよね。」, 「もっともっと、ワクワクしたい!」, 「全部叶えたい。」, 「夢は、遠くない。」, 「一歩ずつでいい。」, 「ちゃんと進めてる。」, 「信じてる、わたし。」, 「やればできる子。」, 「可能性は無限大!」, and a tiny closing line at the bottom right. Keep the text legible but decorative, with some overlap behind hair and clothing.

Style: Delicate shoujo anime illustration, luminous pastel rendering, soft line art, translucent fabrics, glitter particles, flower motifs, pearlescent highlights, gentle bloom, highly detailed clothing and accessories. The image should feel joyful, aspirational, and visually busy but harmonious.

Constraints: Keep exactly 1 character, 1 face-covering square, 1 transparent heart-shaped handbag, 1 extended open hand pose, and 7 large headline phrases. Do not add extra characters, realistic photography, dark colors, harsh shadows, watermarks, logos, or English text in the poster. Overall mood: sparkling, excited, hopeful, and self-affirming.
